01 What We Do

Core Services

End-to-end beverage solutions tailored to your unique vision — from the first idea to the final product on the shelf.

01 / 06

Concept Development

Transform ideas into market-ready products with innovative beverage concepts that resonate with target audiences. Market analysis, brand positioning, and product strategy.

02 / 06

Recipe Development

Expert recipe formulation ensuring delicious, scalable beverages that meet specific goals and regulatory requirements. Precision-crafted and production-ready.

03 / 06

Commercial Production

Scale from small batches to large-scale manufacturing with consistency in quality and compliance. Equipment selection, production layout, and process optimisation.

04 / 06

Consulting & Feasibility

Comprehensive feasibility studies for beverage manufacturing units — site planning, equipment specification, investment analysis, and regulatory navigation.

05 / 06

Training Programmes

Hands-on practitioner-led training across fermentation, filtration, and bottling for teams working in commercial wine, beer, and fruit beverage production.

06 / 06

Equipment Supply

Full range of winery and beverage production equipment supplied with consultation and after-sales support — from fermentation tanks to complete bottling lines.

"We are not just consultants — we are partners who walk the entire journey, from the first conversation to the last bottle on the shelf."

02 About Us

A Trusted Partner

Dewise Drink Solutions is a consulting and trading firm specialising in comprehensive beverage solutions. Based in Maharashtra, we serve clients across India with deep expertise in winery setup, production scale-up, equipment procurement, and regulatory navigation.

With a strong foundation in the beverage industry and a commitment to innovation, quality, and sustainability, we deliver tailored solutions that meet the unique needs of each client — whether you are launching your first label or expanding an established production facility.

Sustainability FirstEnergy-efficient equipment and eco-conscious production methods built into every recommendation.
Precision EngineeringSS 304 grade equipment, smart sensors, and technology-forward solutions for consistent quality.
Long-term PartnershipOngoing after-sales support, maintenance, and troubleshooting as your business grows.
03 Equipment Range

State-of-the-Art
Winery Equipment

Click any equipment card to view the full image and detailed specifications. Hover images to reveal colour.

200 L – 50,000 L

Fermentation Tank

SS 304 stainless steel tanks for red wine, white wine, and fruit wine. Advanced temperature control systems optimise fermentation. Easy to sanitise, built for longevity.

1,000 – 5,000 kg/hr

Pneumatic Press

Large-scale grape pneumatic press for high-volume processing. Minimises oxidation and seed tannin extraction for the cleanest, freshest juice possible.

20 – 500 kg per batch

Basket Press

Gentle grape and fruit juice extraction for boutique operations. Preserves delicate flavour characteristics while delivering high yields with minimal oxidation.

500 – 2,000 kg/hr

Grape Stemmer + Mono Pump

Efficient grape stemming with integrated mono pump for gentle fruit transfer. Reduces manual handling and preserves the integrity of the grape at scale.

Hot & Cold Climate

Dual Temperature Chiller

Engineered to work in both extreme hot and cold climates. Capacity designed based on number of connected fermentation tanks — fully scalable cooling.

20×20 to 40×40 sizes

Plate & Frame Filter

High-performance filtration ensuring clarity and purity in the final product. Multiple size options accommodate varying production volumes with consistent results.

Series-mounted system

Cartridge Filter (Trolley)

Mobile trolley-mounted cartridge filter system. Series configuration delivers superior filtration clarity at the final stage before bottling.

Multi-stage filtration

Plate Filter

Precision plate filtration for intermediate and finishing stages. Removes impurities while retaining the desired flavours, aromas, and wine character.

4-head still wine

Bottling Machine

Four-head still wine bottling machine designed for precision and speed. Accommodates various bottle sizes and ensures a perfect airtight seal every time.

Single head, semi-auto

Screw Capping Machine

Reliable single-head semi-automatic screw capping for consistent cap application. Ideal for boutique and mid-scale production runs.

High-speed precision

Automatic Labelling

Automated label application for consistent brand presentation. Compatible with multiple bottle formats and label types for retail-ready finishing.

Multi-fruit compatible

Fruit Milling Machine

Industrial fruit milling for efficient pre-fermentation processing. Compatible with a wide range of fruits to support diverse beverage applications.

High-volume processing

Fruit De-Stoner

Automated stone and seed removal for stone fruits. Ensures clean pulp yield and protects downstream equipment from damage during high-volume production.

Precision formulation

Chemical Mixing Machine

Accurate chemical and additive mixing for SO₂ dosing, fining agents, and nutrient additions. Ensures consistent, repeatable results batch after batch.

Variable frequency drive

Centrifugal Pump (VFD)

Centrifugal pumps with optional VFD fitting for precise flow control and energy efficiency. Suitable for must, wine, and all process fluid transfers.

Full analytical setup

Winery Laboratory

Complete winery laboratory setup for pH, SO₂, alcohol and acid testing. Enables in-house quality control at every stage from must to finished wine.

Equipment

04 Why Dewise

The Difference
We Bring

Choosing Dewise means investing in a partner that elevates your winemaking process, improves efficiency, and enhances the quality of your output.

01 — →

Comprehensive Equipment Range

From boutique crushers to large-scale pneumatic presses — every piece of equipment we supply is engineered to meet the diverse demands of modern beverage production. One reliable source for your entire facility.

SS 304 Grade All Scales Full Range
02 — →

Innovative Technology

The latest advancements in winery equipment — automated systems, smart sensors, and real-time monitoring capabilities that optimise operations and ensure consistent quality batch after batch.

Automation Smart Sensors
03 — →

Sustainability Focus

Energy-efficient equipment and eco-conscious manufacturing processes reduce consumption and minimise environmental impact — aligned with the growing demand for sustainable production methods.

04 — →

Exceptional Customer Support

Personalised consultation to help you select the right equipment, followed by committed after-sales support for maintenance and troubleshooting throughout your production journey.

Proven Track Record

8+ years of experience and a reputation for excellence. 15+ brands launched, 50+ projects completed, and 290+ professionals trained across India. Our satisfied clients attest to the quality and performance of our work.
